---
title: "Courses"
---

## Current Courses

### Organizational Behavior
**Program**: Ingeniería Comercial (undergraduate) · FAE, Universidad Diego Portales

Introductory course covering core topics in human behavior within organizations: personality, emotions, motivation, diversity, group dynamics, and leadership. Based on Robbins & Judge, complemented with case analyses and evidence-based evaluations.

<!-- Uncomment when materials are available:
[Syllabus (PDF)](files/syllabi/ob-2026.pdf) · [Course page](teaching/ob-2026/)
-->

---

### Organizational Diagnosis
**Program**: Magíster en Dirección de Personas · FAE, Universidad Diego Portales

Graduate course that prepares students to design and conduct rigorous organizational diagnoses. Students work with real-world cases (TechNova, Muebles del Sur, EcoAcción, Hospital Regional) applying theoretical frameworks and organizational analysis tools.

<!-- Uncomment when materials are available:
[Syllabus (PDF)](files/syllabi/diag-org-2026.pdf) · [Course page](teaching/diag-org-2026/)
-->

---

## Past Courses

<!-- List previous courses here as needed. Example:

### Research Methods in Psychology
**Program**: Psychology (undergraduate) · Universidad de La Frontera

-->

---

::: {.callout-tip}
## Dedicated Course Pages
Some courses may have their own dedicated pages with syllabi, slides, readings, and supplementary materials. These will be linked from the course descriptions above as they become available.
:::
